Common.metaTitle: Aniskwela — Learning that grows with you
Common.metaDescription: Magsaka. Mag-aral. Mag-ani ng patunay. AI-built farming courses that run on the slowest phone, with credentials the world can verify — yours to keep.
Common.metaTwitterDescription: Farm. Learn. Harvest the proof. Verifiable credentials, built for low-bandwidth learners.

States.errorBody: We hit a snag loading this. Please try again — your progress is safe.
States.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for may have moved or no longer exists.

Catalog.title: Courses
Catalog.subtitle: Structured lessons built for low-bandwidth phones — enroll, read, and pass quizzes to earn XP.
Catalog.empty: No published courses yet. Check back soon.

Teacher.homeSubtitle: Upload material, review AI drafts, and publish when ready.
Teacher.coursesSubtitle: Drafts stay private until you publish. Tap a course to preview lessons and quizzes.
Teacher.draftPreviewBanner: Draft — only you can see this preview until you publish.
Teacher.publishedPreviewBanner: Published — learners can enroll from the catalog.
Teacher.noCoursesEmpty: No courses yet. Go to Home and upload a document to generate your first draft.
Teacher.uploadHint: Upload a document and Aniskwela drafts an editable, standards-based course — title and industry are inferred from your file. You review and publish; nothing is published automatically.
Teacher.uploadAutoMetaHint: Title and industry are generated from your document. Upload a PDF or text file to start.
Teacher.generating: Generating draft… this runs once per course.
Teacher.preprocessStat: Source prepared for AI: {raw} chars condensed to {prepared} chars ({pct}% reduction) before course generation.
Teacher.reviewHint: Review and edit your draft, set the passing score, then publish when ready.
Teacher.editorPageSubtitle: Fix AI output before publishing. Changes save to your private draft.
Teacher.editorDraftCta: This course is still a draft — edit lessons and quizzes before publishing.
Teacher.editorSettingsHint: Title, industry, and passing score apply to credential eligibility.
Teacher.editorPassingScoreHint: Learners need this average quiz score to claim a credential.
Teacher.deleteConfirm: Delete "{title}"? Enrolled learners will lose progress. Courses with issued credentials cannot be deleted.
Teacher.deleteSectionHint: Remove this course permanently. Not allowed once learners have credentials.

deleteError.forbidden: You can only delete your own courses.
deleteError.has_credentials: Cannot delete — learners have issued credentials for this course.

editorError.forbidden: You can only edit your own courses.
editorError.not_draft: Published courses cannot be edited yet.

Teacher.errorSchema: The AI draft could not be structured correctly. Please try again with a clearer document.
Teacher.errorFile: That file could not be read. Use a PDF or plain-text file under 10MB.
Teacher.noCourses: No courses yet. Upload a document on Home to draft your first one.

publishError.forbidden: You can only publish your own courses.
publishError.not_enough_content: Add at least one lesson and three quiz questions before publishing.

Funder.homeSubtitle: Define merit-based eligibility against the learner ledger. Disbursement is simulated in this demo — no real funds move.
Funder.simulationNotice: Simulated disbursement only — Aniskwela evaluates eligibility; a licensed partner executes real payouts in production.
Funder.emptyPrograms: No grant programs yet. Create one to target learners by industry, XP, and badges.
Funder.newProgramSubtitle: Set transparent criteria against the merit ledger. Preview eligible learners before saving.
Funder.industryHint: Learners must have completed a course in this industry (e.g. Agriculture).
Funder.requireCredentialLabel: Require verifiable credential in this industry
Funder.amountHint: Shown in audit reports. No funds are transferred in the demo.
Funder.previewSubtitle: Learners matching your criteria right now, sorted by total XP.
Funder.previewEmpty: Adjust criteria or wait for learners to earn more merit.
Funder.disburseSubtitle: Run a labelled simulation and export an audit report for your records.
Funder.disburseConfirm: This records a simulated payout for all currently eligible learners. No money will move.
Funder.disburseSuccessBanner: Simulated disbursement recorded — no funds were transferred. A licensed partner executes real payouts in production.
Funder.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Disbursement history for this program will also be removed.

error.sign_up_failed: Sign up failed. Please try again.
error.email_rate_limit: Too many confirmation emails were sent from this project. Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to .env.local for dev signup without emails, or disable “Confirm email” in Supabase → Authentication → Email.

CourseDetail.noLessons: This course has no lessons yet. Check back after the teacher publishes content.
CourseDetail.enrolledBanner: You are enrolled. Work through the lessons below to earn XP.
CourseDetail.metaLine: {count, plural, one {# lesson} other {# lessons}} · Pass quizzes at {passing}% or higher
CourseDetail.quizPreviewHint: Sign in and enroll to submit your answers.

Landing.heroEyebrow: Built for Filipino farmers — Filipino + English
Landing.heroTitle: Learning that grows with you — and stays yours
Landing.heroBody: AI-built farming courses on the slowest phone — with credentials anyone can verify. Proof is earned, never dangled.
Landing.ladderTitle: Every lesson moves you up — slowly, visibly, and it's yours to keep
Landing.ladderSubtitle: Merit accumulates from your first lesson to mentoring others. XP is a record of sustained effort — never spent, never burned.
Landing.journeyTitle: Sow, grow, reap — and keep the proof
Landing.journeySubtitle: Four steps from your first lesson to proof you keep.
Landing.journeySowDesc: Short lessons on any phone — built for study after farm work.
Landing.journeyGrowDesc: Earn XP, keep a streak, climb Seed to Mentor.
Landing.journeyReapDesc: Finish the course and receive a W3C credential, hash-anchored on Stellar.
Landing.journeyKeepDesc: Your credential travels with you. No wallet needed to verify.
Landing.trustTitle: Standards-based credentials funders and employers can trust
Landing.trustSubtitle: No NFTs, no tokens, no PII on-chain. Just open standards and a tamper-evident hash.
Landing.demoSubtitle: Follow the full flow: a teacher uploads material, AI drafts a course, learners complete lessons, and earn a credential anyone can verify — no login required.
Landing.demoTourUploadDesc: A PDF or document on extension topics — no video skills needed.
Landing.demoTourLearnDesc: Readable lessons and quizzes; XP and streak update as they finish.
Landing.demoTourVerifyDesc: A public link and QR confirm the signature and on-chain hash.
Landing.demoPlaceholderHint: Explore the live app via Browse courses or sign up as a teacher.
Landing.aboutTitle: Teach, learn, and verify — growth that stays yours
Landing.aboutBody: Aniskwela blends harvest (*ani*) and school (*eskwela*) — the journey from Seed to Mentor. We turn that into practical tools: teachers build courses, learners accumulate merit, and credentials travel with them.
Landing.aboutTeachDesc: Upload a document; AI drafts modules and quizzes. Every course is teacher-reviewed before publish.
Landing.aboutLearnDesc: Lessons built for low-bandwidth phones. XP, streaks, and badges record sustained effort — never spent or burned.
Landing.aboutVerifyDesc: Pass the final assessment and receive a W3C credential whose hash is anchored on Stellar — verifiable by anyone.
Landing.featuresTitle: Practical support across every role in the learning journey
Landing.featuresSubtitle: Aniskwela is organized around teachers who create, learners who grow, and funders who need transparent merit signals.
Landing.feat1Body: Turn PDFs and documents into structured courses with lessons, quizzes, and difficulty tags — once per course, always reviewed.
Landing.feat2Body: XP, streaks, and badges form a cumulative record funders and employers can trust — learning-first, not learn-to-earn.
Landing.feat3Body: Open Badges 3.0 credentials with a public verifier URL and QR — portable proof that works beyond Aniskwela.
Landing.feat4Body: Light theme, system fonts, minimal JS — engineered for sub-3G and 1GB-RAM Android devices.
Landing.feat5Body: Switch language in place across the whole platform — no reload, no friction for Maricel studying after farm work.
Landing.feat6Body: Define grant criteria against the merit ledger and see who qualifies — mock disbursement in MVP, real partners in Phase 1.
Landing.techTitle: AI, data, and trust — explained as one pipeline
Landing.techSubtitle: Course generation runs server-side with guardrails; credentials anchor hash-only on Stellar Testnet. No PII on-chain.
Landing.tech1Desc: Structured course drafts from teacher uploads — called once per course, schema-validated, never on the learner read path.
Landing.tech2Desc: Auth, Postgres, and storage with row-level security — progress, merit ledger, and credentials stay server-owned.
Landing.tech3Desc: Hash-only credential anchoring via Horizon — tamper evidence without wallets required for learners.
Landing.mockupsTitle: A closer look at the Aniskwela experience
Landing.mockupsSubtitle: Each screen maps to a step in the journey: create, learn, and prove.
Landing.mock1Desc: Teachers upload source material and receive an editable AI draft to review before publish.
Landing.mock2Desc: Readable lessons and quizzes on low-end devices — progress and XP update as learners finish.
Landing.mock3Desc: Shareable credential links and QR codes; third parties verify signature and on-chain hash without an account.
Landing.flowTitle: From first upload to credential in four clear steps
Landing.flowSubtitle: Simple enough for a demo, rigorous enough for funders and employers to trust.
Landing.flow1Desc: Teacher uploads a PDF or document
Landing.flow2Desc: AI drafts a structured course for review
Landing.flow3Desc: Learners complete lessons and earn XP
Landing.flow4Desc: Pass the final — get a verifiable credential
Landing.waitlistHint: Be first to know when we open early access. We'll only email you about Aniskwela.
Landing.waitlistSuccess: You're on the list. We'll be in touch.
Landing.waitlistAlready: You're already on the list — thank you!
Landing.waitlistConsent: By joining, you agree to be contacted about early access.

waitlistError.already_registered: This email is already on the waitlist.
waitlistError.service_unavailable: Waitlist is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
waitlistError.insert_failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
waitlistError.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

Landing.faq1Q: Is this another learn-to-earn crypto thing?
Landing.faq1A: No — learning-first. XP is a merit signal, never a payout tournament; the chain only anchors a credential hash.
Landing.faq2Q: Is this just for crypto people?
Landing.faq2A: Learners never need a wallet; the blockchain is invisible plumbing for tamper-proof credentials.
Landing.faq3Q: How is this different from Duolingo or Coursera?
Landing.faq3A: Filipino-first, sub-3G, teacher-built courses, and credentials funders can verify and fund against.
Landing.faq4A: Every course is teacher-reviewed before publish; high-stakes topics get an extra review tier.
Landing.closeTitle: Get on the list — we're opening with farmers first
Landing.closeSubtitle: Leave your email and we'll invite you when the next cohort opens.
